import { expect, test } from "vitest"; import { parsedType } from "../../util.js"; test("parsedType", () => { expect(parsedType("string")).toBe("string"); expect(parsedType(1)).toBe("number"); expect(parsedType(true)).toBe("boolean"); expect(parsedType(null)).toBe("null"); expect(parsedType(undefined)).toBe("undefined"); expect(parsedType([])).toBe("array"); expect(parsedType({})).toBe("object"); expect(parsedType(new Date())).toBe("Date"); expect(parsedType(new Map())).toBe("Map"); expect(parsedType(new Set())).toBe("Set"); expect(parsedType(new Error())).toBe("Error"); const nullPrototype = Object.create(null); expect(parsedType(nullPrototype)).toBe("object"); const doubleNullPrototype = Object.create(Object.create(null)); expect(parsedType(doubleNullPrototype)).toBe("object"); });
